---
title: "Writing"
description: "Notes on machine learning, medical imaging, and the occasional engineering rabbit hole."
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: numbered
  feed:
    items: 50
    type: full
  sort-ui: [date, title, reading-time]
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---
